---
title: "Breathe"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
  /* Override page background and content area */
  body, .quarto-container, #quarto-content, .page-columns {
    background-color: #2C4A2E !important;
  }

.hero-video-container {
    width: 100vw;
    position: relative;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    height: 60vh;    /* changed from 85vh */
    overflow: hidden;
    margin-bottom: 60px;
  }

  h1.title {
    color: #ffffff !important;
  }

  .hero-video-container video {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
  }

  .running-content {
    max-width: 600px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 20px 80px;
  }

  .running-content h2, .running-content h3 {
    color: #f5f0e8;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  }

  .strava-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    background-color: #FC4C02;
    color: white;
    padding: 12px 24px;
    border-radius: 25px;
    text-decoration: none;
    font-weight: bold;
    font-size: 16px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(252,76,2,0.4);
    margin-bottom: 48px;
  }
</style>

<!-- Hero Video -->
<div class="hero-video-container">
  <video autoplay muted loop playsinline>
    <source src="running.mp4" type="video/mp4">
  </video>
</div>

<!-- Rest of content -->
<div class="running-content">

  <a href="https://www.strava.com/athletes/53854051" target="_blank" class="strava-btn">
    🏃 View My Strava Profile
  </a>

  <h2>Partnerships</h2>

  <h3>Oakland Half x Under Armour Elite Team</h3>
  <blockquote class="instagram-media"
    data-instgrm-permalink="https://www.instagram.com/p/DWO0y71kTFG/"
    data-instgrm-version="14"
    style="width:100%; max-width:540px;">
  </blockquote>
  <script async src="//www.instagram.com/embed.js"></script>

  <h3>GU: Pace the Rainbow</h3>
  <div style="display:flex; justify-content:center;">
    <iframe
      width="315"
      height="560"
      src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/vY5WS2eHcCo"
      title="Running YouTube Short"
      frameborder="0"
      allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture"
      allowfullscreen>
    </iframe>
  </div>

</div>
```
